events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Given the submittal is missing the product listing page and project note needed to determine whether the crew's shortcut is actually permitted, I marked this `needs_more_info` (not an outright fail) — the shortcut can't be verified as compliant with NEC 408 (listed use), 110.26 (clearance), or 200.4 (grounded conductor ID) without that documentation, so makeup work on the shortcut should pause while non-dependent tasks (mounting, conduit rough-in, clearance layout) continue.
